messages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

messages.message: The 'rawNodes' logical expression could make the dependencies of useEffect Hook (at line 65) change on every render. Move it inside the useEffect callback. Alternatively, wrap the initialization of 'rawNodes' in its own useMemo() Hook.

The 'rawEdges' logical expression could make the dependencies of useEffect Hook (at line 65) change on every render. Move it inside the useEffect callback. Alternatively, wrap the initialization of 'rawEdges' in its own useMemo() Hook.
React Hook "useState" is called conditionally. React Hooks must be called in the exact same order in every component render. Did you accidentally call a React Hook after an early return?
